title: Blanco man found dead at home
description: GEORGE NEWS - George police opened an...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - George police opened an inquest docket following the death of a man at Fortuin Street, Blanco on Friday 24 May at about 05:30.

According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies, reports at their disposal indicates that police were summoned to the residence by a next of kin.

"On arrival they found the man (27) who was later declared dead by paramedics on scene. An autopsy to determine the cause of death is yet to be conducted.

No foul play is suspected at this stage. The investigation continues.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
